2400 SendValue(Progress, 10);
2401 SFV = StopFlyingVoltsPerCell * 100; // this makes it a 16 bit value I can save easily
2402 SendValue(Progress, 20);
2403 MotorChannelZero = map (GetValue(Mvalue), -100, 100, 0, 180); // map to 0 to 180
2404 SendValue(Progress, 30);
2405 RxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(RxVCorrextion);
2406 SendValue(Progress, 40);
2407 UseMotorKill = GetValue(UseKill);
2408 SendValue(Progress, 50);
2409 MotorChannel = GetValue(Mchannel) - 1;
2410 SendValue(Progress, 60);
2411 TimerDownwards = GetValue(c2);
2412 SendValue(Progress, 70);
2413 TimerStartTime = GetValue(n4) * 60;
2414 SendValue(Progress, 80);
2415 PPMdata.UseSBUSFromRX = GetValue(r0);
2416 SendValue(Progress, 90);
2417 PPMdata.PPMChannelCount = GetValue(n5);
2418 SendValue(Progress, 100);
2419 CurrentView = RXSETUPVIEW;
2420 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2421 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2422 SendCommand(pRXSetupView);
2423 AddParameterstoQueue(5); // 5 is the ID for SBUS/PPM at RX selection and PPM channel count
2424
2425}
2426
2427/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2428
2429void UpdateLED()
2430{ // LED Brightness has changed so this ensures it is redisplayed
2431 char n1[] = "n1";
2432 LEDBrightness = GetValue(n1);
2433 LEDBrightness = CheckRange(LEDBrightness, 1, 254);
2434 LedWasGreen = false; // Forces a redisplay if brightness has changed
2435}
2436
2437/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2438
2439void OptionView3End() //
2440{
2441 char TxVCorrextion[] = "t2";
2442 char n1[] = "n1";
2443 char n2[] = "n2";
2444 char n3[] = "n3";
2445 char n4[] = "n4";
2446 char pTXSetupView[] = "page TXSetupView";
2447 char QNH[] = "Qnh";
2448
2449 TxVoltageCorrection = GetValue(TxVCorrextion);
2450 PowerOffWarningSeconds = GetValue(n2);
2451 PowerOffWarningSeconds = CheckRange(PowerOffWarningSeconds, 1, 10);
2452 Qnh = (uint16_t)GetValue(QNH);
2453 if (LEDBrightness != GetValue(n1)) UpdateLED();
2454 ConnectionAssessSeconds = GetValue(n3);
2455 ConnectionAssessSeconds = CheckRange(ConnectionAssessSeconds, 1, 6);
2456 ScanSensitivity = GetValue(n4);
2457 ScanSensitivity = CheckRange(ScanSensitivity, 1, 255);
2458 SaveTransmitterParameters();
2459 CloseModelsFile();
2460 AddParameterstoQueue(2); // 2 is the ID for sending QNH value to RX
2461 CurrentView = TXSETUPVIEW;
2462 SendCommand(pTXSetupView);
2463 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2464
2465}
2466
2467/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2468void RudderLeftTrim() { MoveaTrim(7); }
2469/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2470void RudderRightTrim() { MoveaTrim(6); }
2471/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2472void AileronRightTrim() { MoveaTrim(0); }
2473/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2474void AileronLeftTrim() { MoveaTrim(1); }
2475/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2476void ElevatorUpTrim()
2477{
2478 uint8_t tt = 2;
2479 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 5;
2480 MoveaTrim(tt);
2481}
2482/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2483void ElevatorDownTrim()
2484{
2485 uint8_t tt = 3;
2486 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 4;
2487 MoveaTrim(tt);
2488}
2489/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2490void ThrottleUpTrim()
2491{
2492 uint8_t tt = 4;
2493 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 3;
2494 MoveaTrim(tt);
2495}
2496/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2497void ThrottleDownTrim()
2498{
2499 uint8_t tt = 5;
2500 if (SticksMode == 2) tt = 2;
2501 MoveaTrim(tt);
2502}
2503/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2504void ResetTransmitterSettings()
2505{ // This function resets all transmitter parameters to the default state.
2506 // Calibration should be done next.
2507
2508 const char Tn[32] = "Unknown";
2509
2510 char prompt[] = "Delete all settings and models?!";
2511 int sofar = 0;
2512 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
2513 char Progress[] = "Progress";
2514
2515
2516 if (!GetConfirmation(pCalibrateView, prompt)) return;
2517 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
2518 SendValue(Progress, 2);
2519
2520 BuddyPupilOnPPM = false;
2521 BuddyMasterOnPPM = false;
2522 ModelNumber = 1;
2523 ScreenTimeout = 120;
2524 Inactivity_Timeout = INACTIVITYTIMEOUT;
2525 strcpy(TxName, Tn);
2526 Qnh = 1009;
2527 DeltaGMT = 0;
2528 BackGroundColour = 214;
2529 ForeGroundColour = White;
2530 SpecialColour = Red;
2531 HighlightColour = Yellow;
2532 SticksMode = 2;
2533 AudioVolume = 20;
2534 Brightness = 100;
2535 PlayFanfare = false;
2536 TrimClicks = true;
2537 ButtonClicks = false;
2538 SpeakingClock = true;
2539 AnnounceBanks = true;
2540 ResetSwitchNumbers();
2541 MinimumGap = 50;
2542 LogRXSwaps = true;
2543 UseLog = false;
2544 AnnounceConnected = true;
2545 ResetAllTrims();
2546 TxVoltageCorrection = 0;
2547 PowerOffWarningSeconds = DEFAULTPOWEROFFWARNING;
2548 LEDBrightness = DEFAULTLEDBRIGHTNESS;
2549 ConnectionAssessSeconds = 1;
2550 AutoModelSelect = false;
2551 MotorChannel = 2; // = 3 really
2552 MotorChannelZero = 0;
2553 TimerDownwards = false;
2554 PPMdata.UseTXModule = false;
2555 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
2556
2557 SetDS1307ToCompilerTime();
2558 for (int k = 1; k < 5; ++k) { // writes default four times!
2559 for (ModelNumber = 1; ModelNumber <= MAXMODELNUMBER; ++ModelNumber) {
2560 ++sofar;
2561 SetDefaultValues();
2562 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2563 SendValue(Progress, (sofar * (100 / MAXMODELNUMBER)) / 4);
2564 KickTheDog();
2565 }
2566 CloseModelsFile();
2567 }
2568
2569 Autoswitch = 1;
2570 SafetySwitch = 2;
2571 BuddySwitch = 3;
2572 BankSwitch = 4;
2573 Channel9Switch = 0;
2574 Channel10Switch = 0;
2575 Channel11Switch = 0;
2576 Channel12Switch = 0;
2577 SWITCH1Reversed = false;
2578 SWITCH2Reversed = false;
2579 SWITCH3Reversed = true;
2580 SWITCH4Reversed = true;
2581
2582 SendValue(Progress, 100);
2583 ModelNumber = 1;
2584 SaveTransmitterParameters();
2585 SaveTransmitterParameters();
2586 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
2587}
2588
2589/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
2590
2591void PointUp()
2592{
2593 MoveCurrentPointUp();
2594}
2595/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2596
2597void PointDown()
2598{
2599 MoveCurrentPointDown();
2600}
2601
2602/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2603
2604void CheckInvisiblePoint()
2605{
2606 if (InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] == EXPONENTIALCURVES) {
2607 if ((CurrentPoint == 2) || (CurrentPoint == 4)) ++CurrentPoint;
2608 }
2609}
2610
2611/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2612
2613void PointSelect()
2614{
2615 ++CurrentPoint;
2616 if (CurrentPoint > 5) CurrentPoint = 1;
2617 CheckInvisiblePoint();
2618 DisplayCurve();
2619}
2620
2621
2622/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2623
2624void GotoGPSView()
2625{
2626
2627 char GotoGPSView[] = "page GPSView";
2628 SendCommand(GotoGPSView);
2629 CurrentView = GPSVIEW;
2630}
2631
2632/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2633
2634void StartBankNames()
2635{
2636
2637 char GotoBankNames[] = "page BankNameView";
2638 char BKS[4][4] = {{"BK1"}, {"BK2"}, {"BK3"}, {"BK4"}};
2639
2640 SendCommand(GotoBankNames);
2641 CurrentView = BANKSNAMESVIEW;
2642
2643 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
2644 SendValue(BKS[i], BanksInUse[i]);
2645 }
2646 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2647}
2648
2649/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2650
2651void EndBankNames()
2652{
2653
2654 char BKS[4][4] = {{"BK1"}, {"BK2"}, {"BK3"}, {"BK4"}};
2655 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
2656 BanksInUse[i] = GetValue(BKS[i]);
2657 }
2658 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2659 StartModelSetup();
2660}
2661
2662/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2663
2664void ListenToBanks()
2665{
2666 char BKS[4][4] = {{"BK1"}, {"BK2"}, {"BK3"}, {"BK4"}};
2667 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
2668 BanksInUse[i] = GetValue(BKS[i]);
2669 PlaySound(BankSounds[BanksInUse[i]]);
2670 DelayWithDog(1200);
2671 }
2672}
2673/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2674void StartModelSetup()
2675{
2676 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
2677 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
2678 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
2679 char Progress[] = "Progress";
2680
2681 if (CurrentView == FAILSAFE_VIEW) { // read failsafe blobs
2682 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
2683 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
2684 FailSafeChannel[i] = GetValue(fs[i]);
2685 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
2686 }
2687 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
2688 }
2689
2690 if (CurrentView == MIXESVIEW) { // read mixes
2691 ReadMixValues();
2692 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
2693 }
2694
2695 SendCommand(pRXSetupView);
2696 CurrentView = RXSETUPVIEW;
2697 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2698 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2699 LastTimeRead = 0;
2700}
2701
2702/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2703void EndModelSetup()
2704{
2705 GotoFrontView();
2706}
2707
2708
2709/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2710void UpdateSpeedScreen(){
2711 char ns[16][4] = {{"n0"}, {"n1"}, {"n2"}, {"n3"}, {"n4"}, {"n5"}, {"n6"}, {"n7"}, {"n8"}, {"n9"}, {"n10"}, {"n11"}, {"n12"}, {"n13"}, {"n14"}, {"n15"}};
2712 char t14[] = "t14";
2713 CheckServoSpeeds();
2714 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
2715 SendValue(ns[i], ServoSpeed[Bank-1][i]);
2716 }
2717 SendText(t14, BankTexts[BanksInUse[Bank-1]]);
2718}
2719
2720/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2721void StartSlowView()
2722{
2723 char GoSlowServoScreen[] = "page SlowServoView";
2724 SendCommand(GoSlowServoScreen);
2725 CurrentView = SLOWSERVOVIEW;
2726 UpdateButtonLabels();
2727 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2728 UpdateSpeedScreen();
2729}
2730
2731
2732/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2733void ReadSpeedsScreen(uint8_t bk){
2734
2735 char ns[16][4] = {{"n0"}, {"n1"}, {"n2"}, {"n3"}, {"n4"}, {"n5"}, {"n6"}, {"n7"}, {"n8"}, {"n9"}, {"n10"}, {"n11"}, {"n12"}, {"n13"}, {"n14"}, {"n15"}};
2736 char Progress[] = "Progress";
2737 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
2738 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
2739 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
2740 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
2741 ServoSpeed[bk][i] = GetValue(ns[i]);
2742 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / 16));
2743 }
2744 SendValue(Progress, 100);
2745 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
2746}
2747
2748/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2749void EndSpeedsScreen()
2750{
2751 ReadSpeedsScreen(Bank-1);
2752 CheckServoSpeeds();
2753 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2754 StartModelSetup();
2755}
2756/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2757void WriteNewCurve()
2758{
2759 char CopyToAllBanks[] = "callfm";
2760 char pSticksView[] = "page SticksView";
2761
2762 if (GetValue(CopyToAllBanks)) {
2763 for (int p = 1; p <= 4; ++p) {
2764 if (p != Bank) {
2765 MinDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MinDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2766 MidLowDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidLowDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2767 CentreDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = CentreDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2768 MidHiDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MidHiDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2769 MaxDegrees[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = MaxDegrees[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2770 InterpolationTypes[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2771 Exponential[p][ChanneltoSet - 1] = Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1];
2772 }
2773 }
2774 }
2775 ChanneltoSet = 0;
2776 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2777 Force_ReDisplay();
2778 SendCommand(pSticksView); // Set to SticksView
2779 CurrentView = STICKSVIEW;
2780 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
2781 ClearText();
2782}
2783
2784/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2785void StartRenameModel()
2786{
2787
2788 char GoRenameModelScreen[] = "page RenameView";
2789 char NewName[] = "NewName";
2790 SendCommand(GoRenameModelScreen);
2791 CurrentView = RENAMEMODELVIEW;
2792 SendText(NewName, ModelName);
2793}
2794
2795/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2796
2797void GetDefaultFilename()
2798{ // Build filename from ModelName as best we can using first 8 chars upper cased
2799 uint8_t j = 0;
2800 uint8_t i = 0;
2801 char mod[] = ".MOD";
2802 while (i < 8) {
2803 if (ModelName[j] > 32) {
2804 SingleModelFile[i] = toUpperCase(ModelName[j]);
2805 ++i;
2806 SingleModelFile[i] = 0;
2807 }
2808 if (ModelName[j] < 32) break;
2809 ++j;
2810 if (i >= 8) break;
2811 }
2812 strcat(SingleModelFile, mod);
2813}
2814
2815/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2816
2817void FixFileName()
2818{
2819 char ModExt[] = ".MOD";
2820 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < strlen(SingleModelFile); ++i) SingleModelFile[i] = toUpperCase(SingleModelFile[i]);
2821 if (!InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) && (strlen(SingleModelFile) <= 8)) strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
2822}
2823
2824/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2825void WriteBackup()
2826{
2827
2828 char ModExt[] = ".MOD";
2829 uint8_t Iterations = 4;
2830 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
2831 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
2832 char Progress[] = "Progress";
2833 SendValue(Progress, 1);
2834 FixFileName();
2835 if ((strlen(SingleModelFile) <= 12) && (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) > 0)) {
2836 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
2837 for (int i = 0; i < Iterations; i++) {
2838 CloseModelsFile();
2839 SingleModelFlag = true;
2840 SaveOneModel(1);
2841 SendValue(Progress, i * (100 / Iterations)); // write several times is needed!! :-)
2842 }
2843 CloseModelsFile();
2844 SingleModelFlag = false;
2845 }
2846 else {
2847 FileError = true;
2848 }
2849 if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
2850 SendValue(Progress, 100);
2851 DelayWithDog(100);
2852 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
2853 LastFileInView = 120;
2854}
2855
2856/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2857void EndRenameModel()
2858{
2859 char NewName[31] = "NewName";
2860 GetText(NewName, ModelName);
2861 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber);
2862 GotoModelsView();
2863}
2864
2865
2866/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2867
2868void LoadModelForRenaming()
2869{
2870 CloseModelsFile();
2871 SingleModelFlag = true;
2872 ReadOneModel(1);
2873}
2874/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2875
2876void RestoreCurrentModel()
2877{
2878 CloseModelsFile();
2879 ModelNumber = SavedModelNumber;
2880 SingleModelFlag = false;
2881 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
2882 SaveAllParameters();
2883}
2884
2885
2886
2887/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2888// Function to display all model IDs and check for duplcates
2889
2890void CheckAllModelIds()
2891{
2892 unsigned int TempModelId;
2893 char Vbuf[15];
2894 char MMemsp[] = "MMems.path=\"";
2895 char GoIDview[] = "page IDsView";
2896 char crlf[] = {13, 10, 0};
2897 char lb[] = "(";
2898 char rb[] = ") ";
2899 char KO[] = ">Duplicate:";
2900 char Okay[] = " (ID OK)";
2901 char n0[] = "n0";
2902 char nb[4];
2903 char buf[MAXBUFFERSIZE];
2904 uint64_t ModelIDs[92];
2905 uint8_t DuplicatesCount = 0;
2906 uint32_t SavedModelNumber = ModelNumber;
2907
2908 SendCommand(GoIDview);
2909 CurrentView = IDCHECKVIEW;
2910 for (ModelNumber = 1; ModelNumber < MAXMODELNUMBER - 1; ++ModelNumber) {
2911 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
2912 ModelIDs[ModelNumber] = ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val64;
2913 }
2914 for (ModelNumber = 1; ModelNumber < MAXMODELNUMBER - 1; ++ModelNumber) {
2915 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
2916 if (ModelNumber == 1) {
2917 strcpy(buf, lb);
2918 }
2919 else {
2920 strcat(buf, lb);
2921 }
2922 Str(nb, ModelNumber, 0);
2923 strcat(buf, nb);
2924 strcat(buf, rb);
2925 strcat(buf, ModelName);
2926 TempModelId = ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[0];
2927 snprintf(Vbuf, 10, "%X", TempModelId);
2928 if (TempModelId) {
2929 strcat(buf, " ");
2930 strcat(buf, Vbuf);
2931 }
2932 TempModelId = ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val32[1];
2933 ModelIDs[ModelNumber] = ModelsMacUnionSaved.Val64;
2934 snprintf(Vbuf, 10, "%X", TempModelId);
2935 if (TempModelId) {
2936 strcat(buf, Vbuf);
2937 int p = 0;
2938 for (unsigned int i = 1; i < MAXMODELNUMBER - 1; ++i) {
2939 if ((ModelIDs[i] == ModelIDs[ModelNumber]) && (i != ModelNumber)) p = i;
2940 }
2941 if (p > 0) {
2942 strcat(buf, KO);
2943 strcat(buf, Str(nb, p, 0));
2944 strcat(buf, "<");
2945 ++DuplicatesCount;
2946 }
2947 else {
2948 strcat(buf, Okay);
2949 }
2950 }
2951 strcat(buf, crlf);
2952 }
2953 SendOtherText(MMemsp, buf);
2954 SendValue(n0, DuplicatesCount);
2955 ModelNumber = SavedModelNumber;
2956 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
2957}
2958
2959
2960/******************************************************************************************************************************/
2961
2962void SelectChannelOrder()
2963{
2964
2965 if (PPMdata.PPMOrderSelection == 1) PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder = PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder1;
2966 if (PPMdata.PPMOrderSelection == 2) PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder = PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder2;
2967 if (PPMdata.PPMOrderSelection == 3) PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder = PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder3;
2968}
2969
2970
2971
2972// ******************************** Global Array1 of numbered function pointers OK up the **********************************
2973
2974// This new list can be huge - up to 24 BITS unsigned!
2975#define LASTFUNCTION1 10 // One more than final one
2976
2977void (*NumberedFunctions1[LASTFUNCTION1])() {
2978 Blank, // 0 Cannot be used
2979 DeleteModel, // 1
2980 StartAudioVisualView, // 2
2981 EndAudioVisualView, // 3
2982 StartTXSetupView, // 4
2983 InputsViewEnd, // 5
2984 SystemPage1End, // 6
2985 SystemPage1Start, // 7
2986 StartWifiScan, // 8
2987 EndWifiScan // 9
2988};
2989
2990 // This list migth become MUCH longer as it limit is 24 bits big
2991
2992// ******************************** Global Array0 of numbered function pointers - OK up to 127 functions ... **********************************
2993
2994// This list can be only up to 127 (7 BITS) functions long
2995
2996#define LASTFUNCTION 78 // One more than final one, because first is number zero
2997
2998void (*NumberedFunctions[LASTFUNCTION])() {
2999 Blank, // 0 Cannot be used
3000 DoMFName, // 1
3001 ModelViewEnd, // 2
3002 DoLastTimeRead, // 3
3003 GotoModelsView, // 4
3004 GotoMacrosView, // 5
3005 PopulateMacrosView, // 6
3006 ExitMacrosView, // 7
3007 ShowChannelName, // 8
3008 StartReverseView, // 9
3009 EndReverseView, // 10
3010 StartBuddyView, // 11
3011 EndBuddyView, // 12
3012 UpLog, // 13
3013 DownLog, // 14
3014 RefreshLog, // 15
3015 LogEND, // 16
3016 DelLOG, // 17
3017 LogVIEW, // 18
3018 SetupViewFM, // 19
3019 StartSubTrimView, // 20
3020 EndSubTrimView, // 21
3021 StartTrimDefView, // 22
3022 Options2End, // 23
3023 DefineTrimsEnd, // 24
3024 OptionView2Start, // 25
3025 OptionView3Start, // 26
3026 OptionView3End, // 27
3027 BuddyChViewStart, // 28
3028 BuddyChViewEnd, // 29
3029 RudderLeftTrim, // 30
3030 RudderRightTrim, // 31
3031 AileronRightTrim, // 32
3032 AileronLeftTrim, // 33
3033 ElevatorUpTrim, // 34
3034 ElevatorDownTrim, // 35
3035 ThrottleDownTrim, // 36
3036 ThrottleUpTrim, // 37
3037 RXOptionsViewStart, // 38
3038 RXSetup1End, // 39
3039 ResetTransmitterSettings, // 40
3040 BindNow, // 41 Not CALLED FrOM Here now
3041 PointUp, // 42
3042 PointDown, // 43
3043 PointSelect, // 44
3044 DualRatesStart, // 45
3045 DualRatesEnd, // 46
3046 DualRatesRefresh, // 47
3047 GotoFrontView, // 48
3048 GotoGPSView, // 49
3049 StartModelSetup, // 50
3050 EndModelSetup, // 51
3051 StartBankNames, // 52
3052 EndBankNames, // 53
3053 ListenToBanks, // 54
3054 StartSlowView, // 55
3055 EndSpeedsScreen, // 56
3056 WriteNewCurve, // 57
3057 StartRenameModel, // 58
3058 EndRenameModel, // 59
3059 YesPressed, // 60
3060 NoPressed, // 61
3061 RenameFile, // 62
3062 CheckAllModelIds, // 63
3063 Blank, // 64 // spare
3064 ReceiveModelFile, // 65
3065 TXModuleViewStart, // 66
3066 TXModuleViewEnd, // 67
3067 DeleteModelID, // 68
3068 StartPong, // 69
3069 StoreModelID, // 70
3070 ResetClock, // 71
3071 SaveSwitches, // 72 (NOW SAVED FROM TX SETUP MENU GLOBALLY FOR ALL MODELS)
3072 ShowScreenAgain, // 73 End of screen timeout when someone touched screen
3073 HideScreenAgain, // 74 Force immediate 'screen timeout'
3074 TrimsToSubtrim, // 75
3075 ReceiveLotsofData, // 76
3076 SetNewDualRate // 77 // when the DualRate behavior scrollable thingy is changed
3077
3078
3079}; // This list migth become longer but a new one is now started above without the 127 limit
3080
3081/*********************************************************************************************************************************
3082 * BUTTON WAS PRESSED (DEAL WITH INPUT FROM NEXTION DISPLAY) *
3083 *********************************************************************************************************************************/
3084FASTRUN void ButtonWasPressed()
3085{
3086 if ((TextIn[0]) || (TextIn[1]) || (TextIn[2]) || (TextIn[3])){ // is there anything in first four bytes?
3087 StartInactvityTimeout();
3088 ScreenTimeTimer = millis(); // reset screen timeout counter
3089 union
3090 {
3091 uint8_t First4Bytes[4];
3092 uint32_t FirstDWord;
3093 } NextionCommand;
3094
3095 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[0] = TextIn[0];
3096 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[1] = TextIn[1];
3097 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[2] = TextIn[2];
3098 NextionCommand.First4Bytes[3] = TextIn[3];
3099
3100 uint32_t NumberedCommand = NextionCommand.FirstDWord & 0x7F; // Just clear the hi BIT ( i.e. -128)
3101 uint32_t NumberedCommand1 = NextionCommand.FirstDWord >> 8; // Shift over to the right to get a number up to 24 BITS
3102
3103#ifdef DB_NEXTION
3104
3105
3106 if ((TextIn[0] < 128) && (TextIn[0] > 28)) {
3107 Look1("Command WORD: ");
3108 Look(TextIn);
3109 }
3110
3111 if ((TextIn[0] > 128) && (TextIn[0] < 255)) {
3112 Look1("7 BIT Command NUMBER: ");
3113 Look(NumberedCommand);
3114 }
3115
3116 if (TextIn[0] == 0) {
3117 Look1("24 BIT command NUMBER: ");
3118 Look(NumberedCommand1);
3119 }
3120
3121#endif
3122
3123 if (!TextIn[0]) { // Now expanded to handle FAR more than 127 functions
3124 if (NumberedCommand1 < LASTFUNCTION1) {
3125 NumberedFunctions1[NumberedCommand1](); // Call the needed 24 BIT function -- with a function pointer
3126 }
3127 ClearText();
3128 return;
3129 }
3130
3131 if (TextIn[0] >= 128) {
3132 if (NumberedCommand < LASTFUNCTION) {
3133 NumberedFunctions[NumberedCommand](); // Call the needed 7 BIT function -- with a function pointer
3134 }
3135 ClearText();
3136 return;
3137 }
3138 // By here, TextIn[0] must be start of a character based command
3139
3140 // The very old code below here is gradually and carefully being replaced by new code in multiple functions - it works fine but is not as efficient as the new code
3141
3142 int i = 0;
3143 int j = 0;
3144 int p = 0;
3145 char Setup[] = "Setup";
3146 char ClickX[] = "ClickX";
3147 char ClickY[] = "ClickY";
3148 char Reset[] = "Reset";
3149 char Front_View[] = "FrontView";
3150 char Sticks_View[] = "SticksView";
3151 char Graph_View[] = "GraphView";
3152 char SetupView[] = "MainSetup";
3153 char DataEnd[] = "DataEnd";
3154 char Data_View[] = "DataView";
3155 char CalibrateView[] = "CalibrateView";
3156 char TrimView[] = "TrimView";
3157 char TRIMS50[] = "TRIMS50";
3158 char MIXES_VIEW[] = "MIXESVIEW"; // first call
3159 char Mixes_View[] = "MixesView";
3160 char FM1[] = "FM 1";
3161 char FM2[] = "FM 2";
3162 char FM3[] = "FM 3";
3163 char FM4[] = "FM 4";
3164 char ReScan[] = "ReScan";
3165 char MixesView_MixNumber[] = "MixNumber";
3166 char ModelsView_ModelNumber[] = "ModelNumber";
3167 char ColoursView[] = "ColoursView";
3168 char SvT11[] = "t11";
3169 char CMsg1[] = "Move all controls to their full\r\nextent several times,\r\nthen press Next.";
3170 char SvB0[] = "b0";
3171 char CMsg2[] = "Next ...";
3172 char Cmsg3[] = "Centre all channels.\r\nPut edge switches fully back,\r\nor fully forward, then press Finish.";
3173 char Cmsg4[] = "Finish";
3174 char Cmsg5[] = "Repeat?";
3175 char Cmsg6[] = "Calbrate again?";
3176 char TypeView[] = "TypeView";
3177 char CopyToAllBanks[] = "callfm";
3178 char RXBAT[] = "RXBAT";
3179 char r2s[] = "r2s";
3180 char r3s[] = "r3s";
3181 char r4s[] = "r4s";
3182 char r5s[] = "r5s";
3183 char r6s[] = "r6s";
3184 char r12s[] = "r12s";
3185 char r0[] = "r0";
3186 char r1[] = "r1";
3187 char SwitchesView[] = "SwitchesView";
3188 char SwitchesView1[] = "SwitchesView1";
3189 char OneSwitchView[] = "OneSwitchView";
3190 char PageOneSwitchView[] = "page OneSwitchView";
3191 char InputsView[] = "InputsView";
3192 char Export[] = "Export";
3193 char Import[] = "Import";
3194 char DelFile[] = "DelFile";
3195 char ModExt[] = ".MOD";
3196 char FailSAVE[] = "FailSAVE";
3197 char FailSafe[] = "FailSafe";
3198 char fs[16][5] = {"fs1", "fs2", "fs3", "fs4", "fs5", "fs6", "fs7", "fs8", "fs9", "fs10", "fs11", "fs12", "fs13", "fs14", "fs15", "fs16"};
3199 char CH1NAME[] = "CH1NAME=";
3200 char CH2NAME[] = "CH2NAME=";
3201 char CH3NAME[] = "CH3NAME=";
3202 char CH4NAME[] = "CH4NAME=";
3203 char CH5NAME[] = "CH5NAME=";
3204 char CH6NAME[] = "CH6NAME=";
3205 char CH7NAME[] = "CH7NAME=";
3206 char CH8NAME[] = "CH8NAME=";
3207 char CH9NAME[] = "CH9NAME=";
3208 char CH10NAME[] = "CH10NAME=";
3209 char CH11NAME[] = "CH11NAME=";
3210 char CH12NAME[] = "CH12NAME=";
3211 char CH13NAME[] = "CH13NAME=";
3212 char CH14NAME[] = "CH14NAME=";
3213 char CH15NAME[] = "CH15NAME=";
3214 char CH16NAME[] = "CH16NAME=";
3215 char HelpView[] = "HelpView";
3216 char SendModel[] = "SendModel";
3217 char Exrite[] = "Exrite";
3218 char ExpR[] = "Exp";
3219 char Smooth[] = "Smooth";
3220 char Lines[] = "Lines";
3221 char GOTO[] = "GOTO:";
3222 char WhichPage[] = "page "; // excessive spaces for page name
3223 char AddMinute[] = "IncMinute";
3224 char Dec_Minute[] = "DecMinute";
3225 char Dec_Hour[] = "DecHour";
3226 char Inc_Hour[] = "IncHour";
3227 char Inc_Year[] = "IncYear";
3228 char Dec_Year[] = "DecYear";
3229 char Inc_Date[] = "IncDate";
3230 char Dec_Date[] = "DecDate";
3231 char Inc_Month[] = "IncMonth";
3232 char Dec_Month[] = "DecMonth";
3233 char DataView_Clear[] = "Clear";
3234 char DataView_AltZero[] = "AltZero";
3235 char Mark[] = "Mark";
3236 char SetupCol[] = "SetupCol";
3237 char b0_bco[] = "b0.bco";
3238 char b0_pco[] = "b0.pco";
3239 char High_pco[] = "High.pco";
3240 char Fm_pco[] = "Fm.pco";
3241 char FrontView_BackGround[] = "FrontView.BackGround";
3242 char FrontView_ForeGround[] = "FrontView.ForeGround";
3243 char FrontView_Special[] = "FrontView.Special";
3244 char FrontView_Highlight[] = "FrontView.Highlight";
3245 char n0[] = "n0";
3246 char Expo[] = "Expo";
3247 char h0[] = "h0";
3248 char StCH[] = "StCH";
3249 char s0[] = "s0";
3250 char StEDIT[] = "StEDIT";
3251 char pLogView[] = "page LogView";
3252 char Prompt[60];
3253 char del[] = "Delete ";
3254 char overwr[] = "Overwrite ";
3255 char ques[] = "?";
3256 char hhead[] = "Create backup file for";
3257 char fprompt[] = "Filename?";
3258 char ProgressStart[] = "vis Progress,1";
3259 char ProgressEnd[] = "vis Progress,0";
3260 char Progress[] = "Progress";
3261 char FrontView_Hours[] = "Hours";
3262 char FrontView_Mins[] = "Mins";
3263 char FrontView_Secs[] = "Secs";
3264 char StartBackGround[] = "click Background,0";
3265 char NotConnected[] = "Model isn't connected!";
3266 char invisb1[] = "vis b1,0";
3267 char invisb0[] = "vis b0,0";
3268 char visb1[] = "vis b1,1";
3269 char visb0[] = "vis b0,1";
3270
3271 // ************************* test many input words from Nextion *****************
3272
3273 if (InStrng(StCH, TextIn)) { // select sub trim channel
3274 SubTrimToEdit = GetValue(s0)-1;
3275 SendValue(n0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit] - 127);
3276 SendValue(h0, SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit]);
3277 ClearText();
3278 return;
3279 }
3280
3281 if (InStrng(StEDIT, TextIn)) { // edit sub trim value
3282 SubTrims[SubTrimToEdit] = GetValue(n0) + 127; // 127 is mid point in 8 bit value 0 - 254
3283 ClearText();
3284 return;
3285 }
3286
3287
3288
3289 if (InStrng(SetupView, TextIn) > 0) { // goto main TX setup screen
3290 ClearText();
3291 if (CurrentView == CALIBRATEVIEW) ReadOneModel(ModelNumber); // because it was cleared for calibration
3292 SaveAllParameters();
3293 CurrentView = TXSETUPVIEW;
3294 SendCommand(pTXSetupView);
3295 LastTimeRead = 0;
3296 CurrentView = TXSETUPVIEW;
3297 ClearText();
3298 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3299 return;
3300 }
3301
3302
3303 if (InStrng(Mark, TextIn) > 0) {
3304 GPSMarkHere = 255; // Mark this location
3305 GPSMaxDistance = 0;
3306 AddParameterstoQueue(3); // 3 is the ID of the MARK HERE parameter
3307 ClearText();
3308 return;
3309 }
3310
3311
3312 if (InStrng(DataEnd, TextIn) > 0) { // Exit from Data screen
3313 SendCommand(pRXSetupView);
3314 CurrentView = RXSETUPVIEW;
3315 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3316 ClearText();
3317 return;
3318 }
3319
3320
3321
3322 if (InStrng(DataView_Clear, TextIn) > 0) { // Clear Data screen
3323 ZeroDataScreen();
3324 ClearText();
3325 return;
3326 }
3327 if (InStrng(DataView_AltZero, TextIn) > 0) { // Set zero altitude on data screen
3328 if (!GroundModelAltitude) {
3329 GroundModelAltitude = RXModelAltitude;
3330 }
3331 else {
3332 GroundModelAltitude = 0;
3333 }
3334 if (!GPSGroundAltitude) {
3335 GPSGroundAltitude = GPSAltitude;
3336 }
3337 else {
3338 GPSGroundAltitude = 0;
3339 }
3340 GPSMaxaltitude = 0;
3341 RXMAXModelAltitude = 0;
3342 ClearText();
3343 return;
3344 }
3345
3346 if (InStrng(HelpView, TextIn) > 0) { // Display Help screen(s)
3347 SavedCurrentView = CurrentView;
3348 CurrentView = HELP_VIEW;
3349 SendHelp();
3350 ClearText();
3351 return;
3352 }
3353 if (InStrng(Dec_Minute, TextIn) > 0) {
3354 DecMinute();
3355 ClearText();
3356 return;
3357 }
3358 if (InStrng(AddMinute, TextIn) > 0) {
3359 IncMinute();
3360 ClearText();
3361 return;
3362 }
3363
3364 if (InStrng(Dec_Hour, TextIn) > 0) {
3365 DecHour();
3366 ClearText();
3367 return;
3368 }
3369 if (InStrng(Inc_Hour, TextIn) > 0) {
3370 IncHour();
3371 ClearText();
3372 return;
3373 }
3374
3375 if (InStrng(Dec_Year, TextIn) > 0) {
3376 DecYear();
3377 ClearText();
3378 return;
3379 }
3380 if (InStrng(Inc_Year, TextIn) > 0) {
3381 IncYear();
3382 ClearText();
3383 return;
3384 }
3385
3386 if (InStrng(Dec_Date, TextIn) > 0) {
3387 DecDate();
3388 ClearText();
3389 return;
3390 }
3391 if (InStrng(Inc_Date, TextIn) > 0) {
3392 IncDate();
3393 ClearText();
3394 return;
3395 }
3396
3397 if (InStrng(Dec_Month, TextIn) > 0) {
3398 DecMonth();
3399 ClearText();
3400 return;
3401 }
3402 if (InStrng(Inc_Month, TextIn) > 0) {
3403 IncMonth();
3404 ClearText();
3405 return;
3406 }
3407
3408 if (InStrng(GOTO, TextIn) > 0) { // Return from Help screen returns here to relevent config screen
3409 i = 5;
3410 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) && i < 30) {
3411 WhichPage[i] = TextIn[i];
3412 ++i;
3413 WhichPage[i] = 0;
3414 } // Get page name to which to return
3415 SendCommand(WhichPage); // this sends nextion back to last screen
3416
3417 CurrentView = SavedCurrentView;
3418
3419 if (CurrentView == PONGVIEW) StartPong();
3420
3421 if (CurrentView == GRAPHVIEW) {
3422 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
3423 SendValue(CopyToAllBanks, 0);
3424 }
3425 if (CurrentView == SWITCHES_VIEW) {
3426 UpdateSwitchesView();
3427 }
3428 if (CurrentView == ONE_SWITCH_VIEW) {
3429 UpdateOneSwitchView();
3430 }
3431 if (CurrentView == MODELSVIEW) {
3432 SendValue(ModelsView_ModelNumber, ModelNumber);
3433 }
3434 if (CurrentView == MIXESVIEW) {
3435 if (MixNumber == 0) MixNumber = 1;
3436 LastMixNumber = 33; // just to be differernt
3437 SendValue(MixesView_MixNumber, MixNumber); // New load of mix window
3438 ShowMixValues();
3439 }
3440
3441 if (CurrentView == MACROS_VIEW) {
3442 // Do nothing!
3443 }
3444 if (CurrentView == CALIBRATEVIEW) {
3445 Force_ReDisplay();
3446 ShowServoPos();
3447 }
3448 if (CurrentView == REVERSEVIEW) {
3449 StartReverseView();
3450 }
3451 if ((CurrentView == STICKSVIEW) || (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW)) {
3452 Force_ReDisplay();
3453 ShowServoPos();
3454 if (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW) {
3455 SendValue(FrontView_Secs, Secs);
3456 SendValue(FrontView_Mins, Mins);
3457 SendValue(FrontView_Hours, Hours);
3458 ForceVoltDisplay = true;
3459 LastConnectionQuality = 0;
3460 }
3461 }
3462 if (CurrentView == LOGVIEW) {
3463
3464 SendCommand(pLogView);
3465 CurrentView = LOGVIEW;
3466 RecentStartLine = 0;
3467 if (UseLog) ShowLogFile(RecentStartLine);
3468 }
3469 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3470 ClearText();
3471 return;
3472 }
3473
3474 if (InStrng(Exrite, TextIn) > 0) { // *******************
3475 if (GetValue(ExpR)) {
3476 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = EXPONENTIALCURVES;
3477 }
3478 if (GetValue(Smooth)) {
3479 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = SMOOTHEDCURVES;
3480 }
3481 if (GetValue(Lines)) {
3482 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = STRAIGHTLINES;
3483 }
3484 Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = GetValue(Expo) + 50; // Note: Getting this value from slider was not reliable (could not return 36!)
3485 ClearText();
3486 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
3487 return;
3488 }
3489
3490 if (InStrng(SendModel, TextIn) > 0) {
3491 i = strlen(SendModel);
3492 j = 0;
3493 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) > 0) {
3494 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
3495 ++j;
3496 ++i;
3497 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
3498 }
3499 SendModelFile();
3500 ClearText();
3501 return;
3502 }
3503 if (InStrng(FailSAVE, TextIn) > 0) { // the FAILSAFE setup is sent to receiver ************** FAILSAFE SETUP **************
3504
3505 if (!BoundFlag ||!ModelMatched ){
3506 MsgBox(pFailSafe, NotConnected);
3507 ClearText();
3508 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3509 return;
3510 }
3511
3512 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
3513 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
3514 FailSafeChannel[i] = GetValue(fs[i]);
3515 SendValue(Progress, i * 100 / 16);
3516 }
3517 SendValue(Progress, 100);
3518 AddParameterstoQueue(1); // 1 is the ID for the FAILSAFE parameters
3519 ClearText();
3520 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3521 return;
3522 }
3523
3524 if (InStrng(FailSafe, TextIn) > 0) {
3525 SendCommand(pFailSafe);
3526 CurrentView = FAILSAFE_VIEW;
3527 UpdateButtonLabels();
3528 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3529 ClearText();
3530 return;
3531 }
3532
3533 if (InStrng(OneSwitchView, TextIn) > 0) {
3534 SwitchEditNumber = GetChannel(); // which switch?
3535 CurrentView = ONE_SWITCH_VIEW;
3536 SendCommand(PageOneSwitchView);
3537 UpdateOneSwitchView();
3538 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3539 ClearText();
3540 return;
3541 }
3542
3543 if (InStrng(SwitchesView1, TextIn) > 0) { // read switch values from screen (could be 1-4)
3544 ReadNewSwitchFunction();
3545 }
3546
3547 if (InStrng(InputsView, TextIn) > 0) {
3548 SendCommand(pInputsView);
3549 CurrentView = INPUTS_VIEW;
3550 UpdateButtonLabels();
3551 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3552 ClearText();
3553 return;
3554 }
3555
3556 if (InStrng(CH1NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3557 p = InStrng(CH1NAME, TextIn);
3558 i = p + 7;
3559 DoNewChannelName(1, i);
3560 ClearText();
3561 return;
3562 }
3563 if (InStrng(CH2NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3564 p = InStrng(CH2NAME, TextIn);
3565 i = p + 7;
3566 DoNewChannelName(2, i);
3567 ClearText();
3568 return;
3569 }
3570 if (InStrng(CH3NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3571 p = InStrng(CH3NAME, TextIn);
3572 i = p + 7;
3573 DoNewChannelName(3, i);
3574 ClearText();
3575 return;
3576 }
3577 if (InStrng(CH4NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3578 p = InStrng(CH4NAME, TextIn);
3579 i = p + 7;
3580 DoNewChannelName(4, i);
3581 ClearText();
3582 return;
3583 }
3584 if (InStrng(CH5NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3585 p = InStrng(CH5NAME, TextIn);
3586 i = p + 7;
3587 DoNewChannelName(5, i);
3588 ClearText();
3589 return;
3590 }
3591 if (InStrng(CH6NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3592 p = InStrng(CH6NAME, TextIn);
3593 i = p + 7;
3594 DoNewChannelName(6, i);
3595 ClearText();
3596 return;
3597 }
3598 if (InStrng(CH7NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3599 p = InStrng(CH7NAME, TextIn);
3600 i = p + 7;
3601 DoNewChannelName(7, i);
3602 ClearText();
3603 return;
3604 }
3605 if (InStrng(CH8NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3606 p = InStrng(CH8NAME, TextIn);
3607 i = p + 7;
3608 DoNewChannelName(8, i);
3609 ClearText();
3610 return;
3611 }
3612 if (InStrng(CH9NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3613 p = InStrng(CH9NAME, TextIn);
3614 i = p + 7;
3615 DoNewChannelName(9, i);
3616 ClearText();
3617 return;
3618 }
3619 if (InStrng(CH10NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3620 p = InStrng(CH10NAME, TextIn);
3621 i = p + 8;
3622 DoNewChannelName(10, i);
3623 ClearText();
3624 return;
3625 }
3626 if (InStrng(CH11NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3627 p = InStrng(CH11NAME, TextIn);
3628 i = p + 8;
3629 DoNewChannelName(11, i);
3630 ClearText();
3631 return;
3632 }
3633 if (InStrng(CH12NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3634 p = InStrng(CH12NAME, TextIn);
3635 i = p + 8;
3636 DoNewChannelName(12, i);
3637 ClearText();
3638 return;
3639 }
3640 if (InStrng(CH13NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3641 p = InStrng(CH13NAME, TextIn);
3642 i = p + 8;
3643 DoNewChannelName(13, i);
3644 ClearText();
3645 return;
3646 }
3647 if (InStrng(CH14NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3648 p = InStrng(CH14NAME, TextIn);
3649 i = p + 8;
3650 DoNewChannelName(14, i);
3651 ClearText();
3652 return;
3653 }
3654 if (InStrng(CH15NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3655 p = InStrng(CH15NAME, TextIn);
3656 i = p + 8;
3657 DoNewChannelName(15, i);
3658 ClearText();
3659 return;
3660 }
3661 if (InStrng(CH16NAME, TextIn) > 0) {
3662 p = InStrng(CH16NAME, TextIn);
3663 i = p + 8;
3664 DoNewChannelName(16, i);
3665 ClearText();
3666 return;
3667 }
3668
3669 if (InStrng(DelFile, TextIn) > 0) { // Delete a file
3670 j = 0;
3671 p = InStrng(DelFile, TextIn);
3672 i = p + 6;
3673 while (uint8_t(TextIn[i]) > 0) {
3674 SingleModelFile[j] = TextIn[i];
3675 ++j;
3676 ++i;
3677 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
3678 }
3679 strcpy(Prompt, del);
3680 strcat(Prompt, SingleModelFile);
3681 strcat(Prompt, ques);
3682 if (GetConfirmation(pModelsView, Prompt)) {
3683 SD.remove(SingleModelFile);
3684 BuildDirectory();
3685 LoadFileSelector();
3686 --FileNumberInView;
3687 ShowFileNumber();
3688 }
3689 CloseModelsFile();
3690 ClearText();
3691 return;
3692 }
3693
3694 if (InStrng(SwitchesView, TextIn)) {
3695 SendCommand(pSwitchesView);
3696 UpdateSwitchesView(); // display saved values
3697 CurrentView = SWITCHES_VIEW;
3698 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3699 ClearText();
3700 return;
3701 }
3702
3703 if (InStrng(CalibrateView, TextIn)) {
3704 SendCommand(pCalibrateView);
3705 Force_ReDisplay();
3706 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
3707 ClearText();
3708 return;
3709 }
3710
3711 if (InStrng(Export, TextIn)) {
3712 GetDefaultFilename();
3713 if (GetBackupFilename(pModelsView, SingleModelFile, ModelName, hhead, fprompt)) {
3714 FixFileName();
3715 if (CheckFileExists(SingleModelFile)) {
3716 strcpy(Prompt, overwr);
3717 strcat(Prompt, SingleModelFile);
3718 strcat(Prompt, ques);
3719 if (GetConfirmation(pModelsView, Prompt)) {
3720 WriteBackup();
3721 }
3722 }
3723 else {
3724 WriteBackup();
3725 }
3726 }
3727 BuildDirectory(); // of SD card
3728 LoadFileSelector();
3729 ClearText();
3730 return;
3731 }
3732
3733 p = InStrng(Import, TextIn);
3734 if (p > 0) {
3735 j = 0;
3736 i = p + 5;
3737 while (TextIn[i] > 0) {
3738 SingleModelFile[j] = toUpperCase(TextIn[i]);
3739 ++j;
3740 ++i;
3741 SingleModelFile[j] = 0;
3742 }
3743 strcpy(Prompt, overwr);
3744 strcat(Prompt, ModelName);
3745 strcat(Prompt, ques);
3746 if (GetConfirmation(pModelsView, Prompt)) {
3747 SendCommand(ProgressStart);
3748 DelayWithDog(10);
3749 SendValue(Progress, 5);
3750 DelayWithDog(10);
3751 if (InStrng(ModExt, SingleModelFile) == 0) strcat(SingleModelFile, ModExt);
3752 SingleModelFlag = true;
3753 SendValue(Progress, 10);
3754 DelayWithDog(10);
3755 CloseModelsFile();
3756 ReadOneModel(1);
3757 SendValue(Progress, 50);
3758 DelayWithDog(10);
3759 SingleModelFlag = false;
3760 CloseModelsFile();
3761 SendValue(Progress, 75);
3762 DelayWithDog(10);
3763 SaveAllParameters();
3764 CloseModelsFile();
3765 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3766 SendValue(Progress, 100);
3767 DelayWithDog(10);
3768 SendCommand(ProgressEnd);
3769 if (FileError) ShowFileErrorMsg();
3770 LoadModelSelector();
3771 }
3772 ClearText();
3773 return;
3774 }
3775
3776
3777 if (InStrng(ColoursView, TextIn) > 0) {
3778 CurrentView = COLOURS_VIEW;
3779 SendCommand(pColoursView);
3780 SendCommand(StartBackGround);
3781 ClearText();
3782 return;
3783 }
3784
3785 if (InStrng(SetupCol, TextIn) > 0) { // This is the return from Colours setup
3786 HighlightColour = GetOtherValue(High_pco);
3787 ForeGroundColour = GetOtherValue(b0_pco);
3788 BackGroundColour = GetOtherValue(b0_bco);
3789 SpecialColour = GetOtherValue(Fm_pco);
3790 SendValue(FrontView_BackGround, BackGroundColour);
3791 SendValue(FrontView_ForeGround, ForeGroundColour);
3792 SendValue(FrontView_Special, SpecialColour);
3793 SendValue(FrontView_Highlight, HighlightColour);
3794 SaveTransmitterParameters();
3795 CurrentView = TXSETUPVIEW;
3796 SendCommand(pTXSetupView);
3797 LastTimeRead = 0;
3798 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3799 ClearText();
3800 return;
3801 }
3802
3803 if (InStrng(TypeView, TextIn) > 0) {
3804 SendCommand(pTypeView);
3805 SendValue(r2s, 0); // Zero all RX batt cell count
3806 SendValue(r3s, 0);
3807 SendValue(r4s, 0);
3808 SendValue(r5s, 0);
3809 SendValue(r6s, 0);
3810 SendValue(r12s, 0);
3811 SendValue(r0, 0);
3812 SendValue(r1, 0);
3813 if (RXCellCount == 2) SendValue(r2s, 1); // Then update RX batt cell count
3814 if (RXCellCount == 3) SendValue(r3s, 1);
3815 if (RXCellCount == 4) SendValue(r4s, 1);
3816 if (RXCellCount == 5) SendValue(r5s, 1);
3817 if (RXCellCount == 6) SendValue(r6s, 1);
3818 if (RXCellCount == 12) SendValue(r12s, 1);
3819 if (TXLiPo)
3820 SendValue(r1, 1);
3821 else
3822 SendValue(r0, 1);
3823
3824 ClearText();
3825 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3826 return;
3827 }
3828
3829 if (InStrng(RXBAT, TextIn) > 0) { // UPdate RX batt cell count
3830 if (GetValue(r2s) == 1) RXCellCount = 2;
3831 if (GetValue(r3s) == 1) RXCellCount = 3;
3832 if (GetValue(r4s) == 1) RXCellCount = 4;
3833 if (GetValue(r5s) == 1) RXCellCount = 5;
3834 if (GetValue(r6s) == 1) RXCellCount = 6;
3835 if (GetValue(r12s) == 1) RXCellCount = 12;
3836 if (GetValue(r0) == 1) TXLiPo = false; // TX LIFE
3837 if (GetValue(r1) == 1) TXLiPo = true; // TX LIPO
3838 SaveAllParameters();
3839 ClearText();
3840 return;
3841 }
3842
3843 if (InStrng(TrimView, TextIn) > 0) { // TrimView just appeared, so update it.
3844 StartTrimView();
3845 return;
3846 }
3847
3848 if (InStrng(TRIMS50, TextIn) > 0) {
3849 for (i = 0; i < 15; ++i) {
3850 Trims[Bank][i] = 80; // Mid value is 80
3851 }
3852 if (CopyTrimsToAll) {
3853 for (i = 0; i < 15; ++i) {
3854 for (int fm = 1; fm < 5; ++fm) {
3855 Trims[fm][i] = 80;
3856 }
3857 }
3858 }
3859 ClearText();
3860 return;
3861 }
3862
3863 if (InStrng(Setup, TextIn) > 0) { // Which channel to setup ... Goes to GraphView
3864 ChanneltoSet = GetChannel();
3865 CurrentView = GRAPHVIEW;
3866 SendCommand(pGraphView); // Set to GraphView
3867 DisplayCurve();
3868 updateInterpolationTypes();
3869 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3870 SendValue(CopyToAllBanks, 0);
3871 ClearText();
3872 return;
3873 }
3874
3875 if (InStrng(Front_View, TextIn)) {
3876 CurrentView = FRONTVIEW;
3877 ClearText();
3878 PreviousBank = 250; // sure to be different
3879 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3880 ClearText();
3881 return;
3882 }
3883
3884 if (InStrng(Sticks_View, TextIn)) {
3885 SendCommand(pSticksView);
3886 Force_ReDisplay();
3887 CurrentView = STICKSVIEW;
3888 SendCommand(pSticksView); // Set to SticksView
3889 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3890 UpdateButtonLabels();
3891 ClearText();
3892 return;
3893 }
3894
3895
3896 if (InStrng(ReScan, TextIn))
3897 {
3898 DrawFhssBox();
3899 DoScanInit();
3900 ClearText();
3901 return;
3902 }
3903
3904 if (InStrng(MIXES_VIEW, TextIn)) { // First call to load screen
3905 SendCommand(pMixesView);
3906 CurrentView = MIXESVIEW;
3907 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3908 if (MixNumber == 0) MixNumber = 1;
3909 LastMixNumber = MixNumber;
3910 SendValue(MixesView_MixNumber, MixNumber); // New load of mix window
3911 ShowMixValues();
3912 DelayWithDog(100); // allow time for screen to load before reading data
3913 ReceiveLotsofData();
3914 FixCHNames();
3915 ClearText();
3916 return;
3917 }
3918 if (InStrng(Mixes_View, TextIn)) { // Mix number OR a parameter has changed
3919 CurrentView = MIXESVIEW;
3920 uint8_t ThisMixNumber = MixNumber; // save it
3921 MixNumber = GetValue(MixesView_MixNumber);
3922 if (LastMixNumber != MixNumber) // Did number change?
3923 {
3924 SendCommand(invisb1);
3925 SendCommand(invisb0);
3926 LastMixNumber = MixNumber; // save new mix number
3927 MixNumber = ThisMixNumber; // Force back to old number to grab last lot before doing new one
3928 ReadMixValues(); // Read them from screen
3929 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber); // Save them to SD card
3930 MixNumber = LastMixNumber; // back to new one
3931 ShowMixValues(); // show new lot
3932 SendCommand(visb1);
3933 SendCommand(visb0);
3934 } else {
3935 ReadMixValues(); //
3936 }
3937 FixCHNames();
3938 ClearText();
3939 return;
3940 }
3941
3942 if (InStrng(Graph_View, TextIn))
3943 {
3944 CurrentView = GRAPHVIEW;
3945 ClearText();
3946 return;
3947 }
3948
3949 if (InStrng(Data_View, TextIn))
3950 {
3951 CurrentView = DATAVIEW;
3952 LastShowTime = 0;
3953 ForceDataRedisplay();
3954 SendCommand(pDataView);
3955 ClearText();
3956 return;
3957 }
3958
3959 if (InStrng(FM1, TextIn))
3960 {
3961 Bank = 1;
3962 PreviousBank = 1;
3963 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3964 ClearText();
3965 return;
3966 }
3967
3968 if (InStrng(FM2, TextIn))
3969 {
3970 Bank = 2;
3971 PreviousBank = 2;
3972 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3973 ClearText();
3974 return;
3975 }
3976
3977 if (InStrng(FM3, TextIn))
3978 {
3979 Bank = 3;
3980 PreviousBank = 3;
3981 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3982 ClearText();
3983 return;
3984 }
3985
3986 if (InStrng(FM4, TextIn))
3987 {
3988 Bank = 4;
3989 PreviousBank = 4;
3990 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
3991 ClearText();
3992 return;
3993 }
3994
3995 if (InStrng(Reset, TextIn)) // Now zeros EXPO only
3996 {
3997 Exponential[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = DEFAULT_EXPO;
3998 InterpolationTypes[Bank][ChanneltoSet - 1] = EXPONENTIALCURVES; // expo = default
3999 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
4000 return;
4001 }
4002
4003 p = (InStrng(ClickX, TextIn)); // Clicked to move point?
4004 if (p > 0) {
4005 XtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, TextIn);
4006 // This drops through to get Y as well before moving the point
4007 }
4008 p = (InStrng(ClickY, TextIn)); // Clicked to move point?
4009 if (p > 0) {
4010 YtouchPlace = GetNextNumber(p + 7, TextIn);
4011 MovePoint();
4012 DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
4013 return;
4014 }
4015 if (CurrentMode == NORMAL) {
4016 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
4017 BlueLedOn();
4018 SetDefaultValues();
4019 ResetSwitchNumbers();
4020 SaveTransmitterParameters();
4021 ReduceLimits(); // Get setup for sticks calibration
4022 CurrentMode = CALIBRATELIMITS;
4023 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
4024 SendText1(SvT11, CMsg1);
4025 SendText(SvB0, CMsg2);
4026 ClearText();
4027 BlueLedOn();
4028 return;
4029 }
4030 }
4031
4032 if (CurrentMode == CALIBRATELIMITS) {
4033 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
4034 CurrentMode = CENTRESTICKS;
4035 CurrentView = CALIBRATEVIEW;
4036 SendText1(SvT11, Cmsg3);
4037 SendText(SvB0, Cmsg4);
4038 ClearText();
4039 return;
4040 }
4041 }
4042 if (CurrentMode == CENTRESTICKS) {
4043 if (strcmp(TextIn, "Calibrate1") == 0) {
4044 CurrentMode = NORMAL;
4045 RedLedOn();
4046 SaveTransmitterParameters(); // Save calibrations
4047 LoadAllParameters(); // Restore all current model settings
4048 SendText(SvB0, Cmsg5);
4049 SendText(SvT11, Cmsg6);
4050 LastTimeRead = 0;
4051 ClearText();
4052 return;
4053 }
4054 }
4055 }
4056 ClearText(); // Let's have cleared text for next one!
4057} // end ButtonWasPressed() (... at last!!!)
4058
4059/************************************************************************************************************/
4060
4061uint16_t MakeTwobytes(bool* f)
4062{ // Pass arraypointer. Returns the two bytes
4063 uint16_t tb = 0; // all false is default
4064 for (int i = 0; i < 16; ++i) {
4065 if (f[15 - i] == true) {
4066 tb |= 1 << (i);
4067 } // sets a bit if true
4068 }
4069 return tb;
4070}
4071
4072
4073/************************************************************************************************************/
4074
4075void ReadBankSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev) // Bank Switch
4076{
4077 if ((sw1 == false) && (sw2 == false))
4078 {
4079 Bank = 2;
4080 }
4081 else {
4082 if (rev) {
4083 if (sw1) Bank = 1;
4084 if (sw2) Bank = 3;
4085 }
4086 else {
4087 if (sw1) Bank = 3;
4088 if (sw2) Bank = 1;
4089 }
4090 }
4091}
4092
4093/************************************************************************************************************/
4094
4095uint8_t ReadCHSwitch(bool sw1, bool sw2, bool rev)
4096{
4097 uint8_t ttmp = 90;
4098 if (sw1 == false && sw2 == false) ttmp = 90;
4099 if (rev) {
4100 if (sw1) ttmp = 0;
4101 if (sw2) ttmp = 180;
4102 }
4103 else {
4104 if (sw1) ttmp = 180;
4105 if (sw2) ttmp = 0;
4106 }
4107 return ttmp;
4108}
4109
4110/************************************************************************************************************/
4111
4112uint8_t CheckSwitch(uint8_t swt)
4113{
4114 uint8_t rtv = 90;
4115 if (swt == 1) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[7], Switch[6], SWITCH1Reversed);
4116 if (swt == 2) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[5], Switch[4], SWITCH2Reversed);
4117 if (swt == 3) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], SWITCH3Reversed);
4118 if (swt == 4) rtv = ReadCHSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], SWITCH4Reversed);
4119 return rtv;
4120}
4121
4122/************************************************************************************************************/
4123
4124void CheckMotorOff()
4125{ // For Safety
4126
4127 if (!UseMotorKill) return;
4128 ReadSwitches();
4129 MotorEnabled = false;
4130 if (Autoswitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
4131 if (Autoswitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
4132 if (Autoswitch == 3 && Switch[0] == SWITCH3Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
4133 if (Autoswitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) MotorEnabled = true;
4134 if (SafetySwitch == 1 && Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed) SafetyON = true;
4135 if (SafetySwitch == 2 && Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed) SafetyON = true;
4136 if (SafetySwitch == 3 && Switch[0] == SWITCH3Reversed) SafetyON = true;
4137 if (SafetySwitch == 4 && Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed) SafetyON = true;
4138 if (SafetyON) MotorEnabled = false;
4139 MotorWasEnabled = MotorEnabled;
4140}
4141
4142
4143/************************************************************************************************************/
4144
4145void ReadSafetySwitch(){
4146 SafetyON = false;
4147 if ((SafetySwitch == 1) && (Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed)) SafetyON = true;
4148 if ((SafetySwitch == 2) && (Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed)) SafetyON = true;
4149 if ((SafetySwitch == 3) && (Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed)) SafetyON = true;
4150 if ((SafetySwitch == 4) && (Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed)) SafetyON = true;
4151}
4152
4153
4154/************************************************************************************************************/
4155void ReadBuddySwitch(){
4156 if (BuddyMasterOnPPM || BuddyMasterOnWireless) {
4157 BuddyON = false;
4158 static bool BuddyWasOn = false;
4159 if ((BuddySwitch == 1) && (Switch[7] == SWITCH1Reversed)) BuddyON = true;
4160 if ((BuddySwitch == 2) && (Switch[5] == SWITCH2Reversed)) BuddyON = true;
4161 if ((BuddySwitch == 3) && (Switch[1] == SWITCH3Reversed)) BuddyON = true;
4162 if ((BuddySwitch == 4) && (Switch[2] == SWITCH4Reversed)) BuddyON = true;
4163 if (BuddyON != BuddyWasOn) {
4164 BuddyWasOn = BuddyON;
4165 LogBuddyChange();
4166 }
4167 }
4168}
4169
4170
4171/************************************************************************************************************/
4172 void ReadBankSwitch(){
4173 if (BankSwitch == 4) ReadBankSwitch(Switch[2], Switch[3], SWITCH4Reversed);
4174 if (BankSwitch == 3) ReadBankSwitch(Switch[0], Switch[1], SWITCH3Reversed);
4175 if (BankSwitch == 2) ReadBankSwitch(Switch[4], Switch[5], SWITCH2Reversed);
4176 if (BankSwitch == 1) ReadBankSwitch(Switch[6], Switch[7], SWITCH1Reversed);
4177 }
4178
4179/************************************************************************************************************/
4180 void ReadAutoAndMotorSwitch(){
4181
4182 MotorEnabled = !UseMotorKill; // If not using motor switch then motor is always enabled.
4183 if (SWITCH1Reversed){
4184 if ((Autoswitch == 1) && (!Switch[6])) MotorEnabled = true;
4185 }else{
4186 if ((Autoswitch == 1) && (!Switch[7])) MotorEnabled = true;
4187 }
4188 if (SWITCH2Reversed){
4189 if ((Autoswitch == 2) && (!Switch[4])) MotorEnabled = true;
4190 }else{
4191 if ((Autoswitch == 2) && (!Switch[5])) MotorEnabled = true;
4192 }
4193 if (SWITCH3Reversed){
4194 if ((Autoswitch == 3) && (!Switch[0])) MotorEnabled = true;
4195 }else{
4196 if ((Autoswitch == 3) && (!Switch[1])) MotorEnabled = true;
4197 }
4198 if (SWITCH4Reversed){
4199 if ((Autoswitch == 4) && (!Switch[2])) MotorEnabled = true;
4200 }else{
4201 if ((Autoswitch == 4) && (!Switch[3])) MotorEnabled = true;
4202 }
4203 if ((Autoswitch == 1) && (!Switch[6] && !Switch[7])) Bank = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
4204 if ((Autoswitch == 2) && (!Switch[4] && !Switch[5])) Bank = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
4205 if ((Autoswitch == 3) && (!Switch[1] && !Switch[0])) Bank = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
4206 if ((Autoswitch == 4) && (!Switch[3] && !Switch[2])) Bank = 4; // Flight mode 4 (Auto) overrides modes 1,2,3.
4207 if (!MotorEnabled) Bank = 4; // Motor off uses bank 4
4208 }
4209
4210/************************************************************************************************************/
4211void GetBank() // ... and the other three switches
4212{
4213 char FrontView_Hours[] = "Hours";
4214 char FrontView_Mins[] = "Mins";
4215 char FrontView_Secs[] = "Secs";
4216 char WarnOff[] = "vis Warning,0";
4217
4218 if ((CurrentMode != NORMAL) && (CurrentMode != LISTENMODE)) return; // not needed if calibrating
4219
4220 ReadSafetySwitch();
4221 ReadBuddySwitch();
4222 ReadDualRateSwitch();
4223 ReadBankSwitch();
4224 ReadAutoAndMotorSwitch();
4225
4226 if (SafetyWasOn != SafetyON) {
4227 if (SafetyON)
4228 {ShowSafetyIsOn();}
4229 else
4230 {ShowSafetyIsOff();}
4231
4232 SafetyWasOn = SafetyON;
4233 }
4234
4235 if (SafetyON) {
4236 MotorEnabled = false;
4237 TimesUp = false;
4238 PausedSecs = 0;
4239 CountDownIndex = 0;
4240 if (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW) {
4241 if (TimerDownwards) {
4242 Mins = TimerStartTime / 60;
4243 }
4244 else {
4245 Mins = 0;
4246 }
4247 SendValue(FrontView_Secs, 0);
4248 SendValue(FrontView_Mins, Mins);
4249 SendValue(FrontView_Hours, 0);
4250 }
4251 }
4252
4253 if ((MotorEnabled != MotorWasEnabled) && (UseMotorKill)) { // MotorEnabled changed ?
4254 if (MotorEnabled) {
4255 if (LedWasRed)
4256 {
4257 MotorEnabled = false;
4258 if (!BuddyPupilOnPPM) {
4259 if ((millis() - WarningTimer) > 4000) {
4260 PlaySound(PLSTURNOFF);
4261 WarningTimer = millis();
4262 }
4263 }
4264 return;
4265 }
4266 ShowMotor(1);
4267 if (AnnounceBanks) PlaySound(MOTORON); // Tell the pilot motor is on!
4268 if (UseLog) LogMotor(1);
4269 TimerMillis = millis(); // Motor ON timerpause off
4270 }
4271 else {
4272 if (AnnounceBanks) PlaySound(MOTOROFF);
4273 if (UseLog) LogMotor(0);
4274 SendCommand(WarnOff);
4275 ShowMotor(0); // Tell the pilot motor is off
4276 if (SendNoData) {
4277 SendCommand(WarnOff);
4278 SendNoData = false; // user turned off motor
4279 }
4280 PausedSecs = ElapsedSeconds; // Motor OFF timerpause started
4281 }
4282 LastSeconds = 0;
4283 ShowMotorTimer();
4284 }
4285 Channel9SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel9Switch);
4286 Channel10SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel10Switch);
4287 Channel11SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel11Switch);
4288 Channel12SwitchValue = CheckSwitch(Channel12Switch);
4289 if (Bank != PreviousBank) {
4290 if (UseLog) LogNewBank();
4291 if (MotorEnabled == MotorWasEnabled) { // When turning off motor, don't sound bank too.
4292 if (AnnounceBanks) SoundBank();
4293 }
4294 if (CurrentView == FRONTVIEW) {
4295 ShowBank();
4296 }
4297 else {
4298 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4299 }
4300 if (CurrentView == GRAPHVIEW) DisplayCurveAndServoPos();
4301 if (CurrentView == SLOWSERVOVIEW) {
4302 ReadSpeedsScreen(PreviousBank-1);
4303 UpdateSpeedScreen();
4304 }
4305 if (CurrentView == DUALRATESVIEW) {
4306 DisplayNewDualRateBank();
4307 }
4308 }
4309 MotorWasEnabled = MotorEnabled; // Remember motor state
4310 PreviousBank = Bank; // Remember BANK
4311}
4312
4313/************************************************************************************************************/
4314void swap(uint8_t* a, uint8_t* b)
4315{ // Just swap over two bytes, a & b :-)
4316 uint8_t c;
4317 c = *a;
4318 *a = *b;
4319 *b = c;
4320}
4321/************************************************************************************************************/
4322void CalibrateEdgeSwitches()
4323{ // This function avoids the need to rotate the four edge switches if installed backwards
4324 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
4325 if (digitalRead(SwitchNumber[i])) {
4326 if (i == 0) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
4327 if (i == 2) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
4328 if (i == 4) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
4329 if (i == 6) swap(&SwitchNumber[i], &SwitchNumber[i + 1]); // swap over switches' pin number if wrongly installed
4330 }
4331 }
4332}
4333/************************************************************************************************************/
4334
4335FASTRUN void ReadSwitches() // and indeed read digital trims if these are fitted
4336{
4337 byte flag = 0;
4338 static uint8_t PreviousTrim = 255;
4339 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
4340 Switch[i] = !digitalRead(SwitchNumber[i]); // These are reversed because they are active low
4341 TrimSwitch[i] = !digitalRead(TrimNumber[i]); // These are reversed because they are active low
4342 if (TrimSwitch[i]) ++flag; // A finger is on a trim lever...
4343 if ((TrimSwitch[i]) && (PreviousTrim != i)) { // is it a new one?
4344 TrimTimer = 0; // it IS a new one, so no delay please.
4345 PreviousTrim = i; // remember which trim it was
4346 }
4347 }
4348 if (flag > 1) { // One at a time please!!
4349 TrimRepeatSpeed = DEFAULTTRIMREPEATSPEED; // Restore default trim repeat speed
4350 for (int i = 0; i < 8; ++i) {
4351 (TrimSwitch[i]) = 0;
4352 flag = 0;
4353 }
4354 }
4355 if (!flag) {
4356 PreviousTrim = 254; // Previous trim must now match none
4357 TrimRepeatSpeed = DEFAULTTRIMREPEATSPEED; // Restore default trim repeat speed
4358 }
4359}
4360
4361/************************************************************************************************************/
4362
4363void WarnUserOfVersionsMismatch(){
4364 char TXVersionNumber[] = "Version mismatch!\r\n\r\nTX = ";
4365 char RXVersionNumber[] = "\r\nRX = ";
4366 char TheFix[] = "\r\nPlease update TX and/or RX \r\nto the same version.";
4367 char Prompt[150];
4368 char FrontView[] = "page FrontView";
4369 strcpy(Prompt, TXVersionNumber);
4370 strcat(Prompt, TransmitterVersionNumber);
4371 strcat(Prompt, RXVersionNumber);
4372 strcat(Prompt, ReceiverVersionNumber);
4373 strcat(Prompt, TheFix); // Build up the prompt
4374 PlaySound(WHAHWHAHMSG); // Play warning sound
4375 MsgBox(FrontView,Prompt);
4376 ForceDataRedisplay(); // force redisplay of data on FrontView
4377 CurrentView = 255; // force redisplay of data on FrontView
4378 GotoFrontView();
4379}
4380
4381/************************************************************************************************************/
4382
4383void CompareVersionNumbers(){ // Warn user if TX and RX versions don't match - but ignore final letter
4384
4385 if (VersionsCompared) return;
4386 if ((strlen(ReceiverVersionNumber) > 11) || (ReceiverVersionNumber[1] != '.')) return; // Too long etc for a version number. Probably binding data !
4387 VersionsCompared = true;
4388 for (int i = 0; i < 5; ++i) {
4389 if (ReceiverVersionNumber[i] != TransmitterVersionNumber[i]){ // Compare the two version numbers, but not the letter
4390 WarnUserOfVersionsMismatch();
4391 return;
4392 }
4393 }
4394}
4395
4396/************************************************************************************************************/
4397
4398void GotoFrontView()
4399{
4400 char fms[4][4] = {{"fm1"}, {"fm2"}, {"fm3"}, {"fm4"}};
4401 char FrontView_Connected[] = "Connected";
4402
4403
4404 PupilIsAlive = 0;
4405 MasterIsAlive = 0;
4406 LastAutoModelSelect = true;
4407 LastCopyTrimsToAll = true;
4408 OldRate = 235; // forced different
4409 ForceVoltDisplay = true; // force redisplay of voltage
4410 LastConnectionQuality = 0; // force redisplay of connection quality
4411
4412
4413 if (CurrentView != FRONTVIEW) {
4414 if (CurrentView == SCANVIEW) DoScanEnd(); // Put transceiver back to normal mode
4415 if (CurrentView == PONGVIEW) ReadOneModel(ModelNumber); // Return to current model
4416 if (CurrentMode != LISTENMODE) CurrentMode = NORMAL; // Return to normal mode unless in BUDDY listen mode
4417 SendCommand(pFrontView); // Set to FrontView
4418 CurrentView = FRONTVIEW; // Set to FrontView
4419 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere(); // Update model name
4420 SafetyWasOn ^= 1; // this forces a re-display of safety state
4421 BeQuiet = true; // this means no announcement of safety this time
4422 ShowBank();
4423 LastTimeRead = 0;
4424 Reconnected = false; // this is to make '** Connected! **' redisplay (in ShowComms())
4425 LastSeconds = 0; // This forces redisplay of timer...
4426 Force_ReDisplay();
4427 ShowMotorTimer();
4428 ClearText();
4429 LastShowTime = 0; // this is to make redisplay sooner (in ShowComms())
4430 SendText(FrontView_Connected, na);
4431 }
4432 for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {
4433 SendText(fms[i], BankTexts[BanksInUse[i]]);
4434 }
4435 ForceDataRedisplay();
4436 ShowAMS();
4437 UpdateTrimView();
4438 if (BuddyPupilOnWireless) StartBuddyListen();
4439
4440 CurrentView = FRONTVIEW;
4441 RestoreBrightness();
4442}
4443
4444/************************************************************************************************************/
4445bool CheckModelName()
4446{ // In ModelsView, this function checks correct name is displayed.
4447 // it returns true if it has changed
4448 char MMems[] = "MMems";
4449 char Mfiles[] = "Mfiles";
4450 char mn[] = "modelname";
4451
4452 ModelNumber = GetValue(MMems) + 1;
4453 FileNumberInView = GetValue(Mfiles);
4454 if (FileNumberInView != LastFileInView) {
4455 ShowFileNumber();
4456 LastFileInView = FileNumberInView;
4457 }
4458 if (LastModelLoaded != ModelNumber) {
4459 if ((ModelNumber >= MAXMODELNUMBER) || (ModelNumber < 1)) {
4460 ModelNumber = 1;
4461 SendValue(MMems, ModelNumber - 1);
4462 }
4463 ReadOneModel(ModelNumber);
4464 SendText(mn, ModelName);
4465 if (UseLog) LogThisModel();
4466 LastModelLoaded = ModelNumber;
4467 UpdateModelsNameEveryWhere();
4468 return true;
4469 }
4470 ClearText();
4471 return false;
4472}
4473
4474
4475/************************************************************************************************************/
4476void SimulateCloseDown()
4477{ // Because real closedown occurs only after button is released, this function simulates it.
4478 char ScreenOff[] = "dim=0";
4479 analogWrite(GREENLED, 0);
4480 analogWrite(BLUELED, 0);
4481 analogWrite(REDLED, 0);
4482 SendCommand(ScreenOff);
4483 SaveAllParameters();
4484 DelayWithDog(250);
4485 digitalWrite(POWER_OFF_PIN, HIGH);
4486}
4487
4488/************************************************************************************************************/
4489void CheckPowerOffButton()
4490{
4491 static bool PowerWarningVisible = false;
4492 static uint32_t PowerOffTimer = 0;
4493 static uint8_t TurnOffSecondToGo = PowerOffWarningSeconds;
4494 char PowerMsg[15];
4495 char PowerPre[] = "TURN OFF?! ";
4496 char nb[4];
4497 char NotStillConnected[] = "vis StillConnected,0";
4498 char StillConnected[] = "vis StillConnected,1";
4499 char StillConnectedBox[] = "StillConnected";
4500
4501 if (!digitalRead(BUTTON_SENSE_PIN)) {
4502
4503 if (BoundFlag && ModelMatched) GotoFrontView();
4504
4505 if (!LedWasGreen && !PPMdata.UseTXModule)
4506 {
4507 SimulateCloseDown(); // if not connected power off immediately
4508 }
4509 if (LedWasGreen || PPMdata.UseTXModule)
4510 {
4511 if (!PowerOffTimer) {
4512 PowerOffTimer = millis(); // Start a timer for power off button down
4513 TurnOffSecondToGo = PowerOffWarningSeconds;
4514 }
4515 }
4516 }
4517 else {
4518 PowerOffTimer = 0;
4519 TurnOffSecondToGo = PowerOffWarningSeconds;
4520 }
4521
4522 if (PowerOffTimer) { // count down started
4523 if (!PowerWarningVisible) {
4524 SendCommand(StillConnected);
4525 SaveOneModel(ModelNumber); // in case any trim change etc wasn't saved
4526 PowerWarningVisible = true;
4527 }
4528 }
4529 else {
4530 if (PowerWarningVisible) {
4531 SendCommand(NotStillConnected);
4532 PowerWarningVisible = false;
4533 TurnOffSecondToGo = PowerOffWarningSeconds;
4534 }
4535 return;
4536 }
4537
4538 if (PowerWarningVisible) {
4539 if ((millis() - PreviousPowerOffTimer) >= 1000) {
4540 strcpy(PowerMsg, PowerPre);
4541 Str(nb, TurnOffSecondToGo, 0);
4542 strcat(PowerMsg, nb);
4543 SendText(StillConnectedBox, PowerMsg);
4544 if (TurnOffSecondToGo <= 0) { // Time's up!
4545 if (UseLog) LogPowerOff(); // log the event
4546 if (PlayFanfare) {
4547 PlaySound(WHAHWHAHMSG);
4548 DelayWithDog(2300);
4549 }
4550 SimulateCloseDown();
4551 }
4552 --TurnOffSecondToGo;
4553 if (TrimClicks) PlaySound(CLICKZERO);
4554 PreviousPowerOffTimer = millis();
4555 }
4556 }
4557}
4558/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4559
4560void AddParameterstoQueue(uint8_t ID)
4561{
4562 if (ParametersToBeSentPointer < 40){
4563 ++ParametersToBeSentPointer;
4564 ParametersToBeSent[ParametersToBeSentPointer] = ID;
4565 }
4566}
4567/*********************************************************************************************************************************/
4568
4569void SendInitialSetupParams(){
4570 AddParameterstoQueue (5); // Sbus / PPM at rx
4571 AddParameterstoQueue (2); // QNH
4572}
4573
4574/************************************************************************************************************/
4575void SendOutstandingParameters(){ // Send any QUEUED parameters that have not been sent yet at the rate of one per second max
4576
4577static uint32_t Localtimer = 0;
4578if (millis() - Localtimer < 1000) return;
4579 Localtimer = millis();
4580 if (BoundFlag && ModelMatched && LedWasGreen){
4581 if (ParametersToBeSentPointer > 0) {
4582 Parameters.ID = ParametersToBeSent[ParametersToBeSentPointer];
4583 --ParametersToBeSentPointer;
4584 AddExtraParameters = true;
4585 }
4586 }
4587}
4588
4589/************************************************************************************************************/
4590void FASTRUN ManageTransmitter()
4591{
4592 static uint32_t LastModelScreenCheck = 0;
4593 static uint32_t TransmitterLastManaged = 0;
4594 uint32_t RightNow = millis();
4595 uint32_t TXPacketElapsed = RightNow - LastPacketSentTime;
4596
4597 KickTheDog(); // Watchdog ... ALWAYS!
4598 if ((PACEMAKER - TXPacketElapsed < TIMEFORTXMANAGMENT) && ModelMatched) return; // If it's almost time to send data, then do not start some other task which might easily take longer.
4599 CheckPowerOffButton(); CheckForNextionButtonPress(); // Pretty obvious really ...
4600
4601 if (RightNow - LastTimeRead >= 1000) { // Only once a second for these..
4602 SendAllAgain(); // in case of missed packets
4603 GetFrameRate(); // Get the frame rate
4604 CheckScreenTime(); // Check if screen needs to be turned off
4605 CheckBatteryStates(); // Check battery states
4606 if (CurrentView != BLANKVIEW) {ReadTime();UpdateTrimView();} // Show time and trim positions
4607 ShowMotorTimer();SendOutstandingParameters(); // Show motor timer and send any queued parameters
4608 LastTimeRead = millis(); // Reset this timer
4609 return; // That's enough housekeeping for this time around
4610 }
4611
4612 if ((RightNow - LastModelScreenCheck >= 500)) {
4613 if (CurrentView == MODELSVIEW) {
4614 LastModelScreenCheck = RightNow;
4615 if (CheckModelName()) {
4616 LastModelScreenCheck = RightNow; return; // In ModelsView, this function checks correct name is displayed. It returns true if it has changed
4617 }
4618 }
4619 }
4620
4621 if (RightNow - TransmitterLastManaged >= 50) { // 20 times a second is good
4622 ReadSwitches();CheckHardwareTrims();GetBank(); // Check switch positions 20 times a secon
4623 if (CurrentView != BLANKVIEW) ShowComms(); // Screen Telemetry Data
4624 TransmitterLastManaged = millis();
4625 }
4626}
4627/**********************************************************************************************************/
4628
4629void SendPPM()
4630{ // Send a frame of PPM to Third party TX module
4631 if (millis() - PPMdata.LastPPMFrame >= 10) {
4632 PPMdata.LastPPMFrame = millis();
4633 for (int j = 0; j < PPMdata.PPMChannelsNumber; ++j) {
4634 PPMdata.PPMOutputModule.write(*(PPMdata.PPMChannelOrder + j), SendBuffer[j]);
4635 }
4636 }
4637 if (BuddyMasterOnWireless) {
4638 if ((millis() - LastPacketSentTime) >= FHSS_data::PaceMaker) { //
4639 LastPacketSentTime = millis();
4640 SendSpecialPacketFromPPMModule(); // Send to buddy using Nrf24L01
4641 }
4642 }
4643}
4644
4645/************************************************************************************************************/
4646void FixMotorChannel()
4647{
4648 if (!MotorEnabled && !BuddyON) {
4649 SendBuffer[MotorChannel] = IntoHigherRes(MotorChannelZero); // If safety is on, throttle will be zero whatever was shown.
4650 }
4651}
4652/************************************************************************************************************/
4653void GetBuddyData() // For Master only
4654{
4655 if (BuddyMasterOnPPM) GetSlaveChannelValuesPPM(); // Get buddy PPM data and maybe use it.
4656 if (BuddyMasterOnWireless) GetSlaveChannelValuesWireless(); // Get buddy Wireless data and maybe use it.
4657}
4658/************************************************************************************************************/
4659void DoWirelessBuddyListen(){ // For Slave only
4660 GetNewChannelValues(); // Read sticks and trims and switches etc
4661 FixMotorChannel();
4662 ShowServoPos();
4663 GetSpecialPacket(); // Get the special packet and send our control data in the ask payload
4664}
4665/************************************************************************************************************/
4666// LOOP
4667/************************************************************************************************************/
4668
4669FASTRUN void loop()
4670{
4671 ManageTransmitter(); // Do the needed chores ... (if there's time)
4672 GetNewChannelValues(); // Load SendBuffer with new servo positions very frequently
4673 if (CurrentMode < 3) {
4674 if (UseMacros) ExecuteMacro(); // Modify it if macro is running
4675 if (BuddyPupilOnPPM) {
4676 NewCompressNeeded = false; // Fake it as Buddy does not send compressed data
4677 ShowServoPos();
4678 }
4679 else { // Skip these next lines when buddying as a slave
4680 GetBuddyData(); // Only if master
4681 FixMotorChannel(); // Maybe force it low BEFORE Binding data is added
4682 ShowServoPos(); // Show servo positions to user
4683 SendBindingPipe(); // Only if not bound yet - overwride low throttle setting
4684 }
4685 }
4686
4687 switch (CurrentMode) {
4688 case NORMAL: // 0
4689 if (!PPMdata.UseTXModule) {
4690 SendData(); // local TX
4691 }
4692 else {
4693 SendPPM();
4694 NewCompressNeeded = false;
4695 }
4696 break;
4697 case CALIBRATELIMITS: // 1
4698 CalibrateSticks();
4699 break;
4700 case CENTRESTICKS: // 2
4701 ChannelCentres();
4702 break;
4703 case SCANWAVEBAND: // 3
4704 ScanAllChannels(false);
4705 break;
4706 case SENDNOTHING: // 4
4707 break;
4708 case PONGMODE: // 5
4709 PlayPong();
4710 break;
4711 case LISTENMODE: // 6 ... listen only ... for wireless buddy
4712 DoWirelessBuddyListen();
4713
4714 break;
4715 default:
4716 break;
4717 }
4718} // end loop()
4719
